mapper.select: select id, period, branch_code, branch_name, promotion_1, promotion_2, account_1, account_2, check_1, check_2, bill_1, bill_2, cash_1, cash_2, staff_count, score, evaluate_amount, key_work_c_sub, key_work_d_sub, evaluate_d_sub, total_all_d, update_time, create_time from tb_branch_performance where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_branch_performance(period, branch_code, branch_name, promotion_1, promotion_2, account_1, account_2, check_1, check_2, bill_1, bill_2, cash_1, cash_2, staff_count, score, evaluate_amount, key_work_c_sub, key_work_d_sub, evaluate_d_sub, total_all_d, update_time, create_time) values (#{period}, #{branchCode}, #{branchName}, #{promotion1}, #{promotion2}, #{account1}, #{account2}, #{check1}, #{check2}, #{bill1}, #{bill2}, #{cash1}, #{cash2}, #{staffCount}, #{score}, #{evaluateAmount}, #{keyWorkCSub}, #{keyWorkDSub}, #{evaluateDSub}, #{totalAllD}, #{updateTime}, #{createTime})

insert into tb_branch_performance(period, branch_code, branch_name, promotion_1, promotion_2, account_1, account_2, check_1, check_2, bill_1, bill_2, cash_1, cash_2, staff_count, score, evaluate_amount, key_work_c_sub, key_work_d_sub, evaluate_d_sub, total_all_d, update_time, create_time) values
(#{entity.period}, #{entity.branchCode}, #{entity.branchName}, #{entity.promotion1}, #{entity.promotion2}, #{entity.account1}, #{entity.account2}, #{entity.check1}, #{entity.check2}, #{entity.bill1}, #{entity.bill2}, #{entity.cash1}, #{entity.cash2}, #{entity.staffCount}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.evaluateAmount}, #{entity.keyWorkCSub}, #{entity.keyWorkDSub}, #{entity.evaluateDSub}, #{entity.totalAllD}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.createTime})

insert into tb_branch_performance(period, branch_code, branch_name, promotion_1, promotion_2, account_1, account_2, check_1, check_2, bill_1, bill_2, cash_1, cash_2, staff_count, score, evaluate_amount, key_work_c_sub, key_work_d_sub, evaluate_d_sub, total_all_d, update_time, create_time) values
(#{entity.period}, #{entity.branchCode}, #{entity.branchName}, #{entity.promotion1}, #{entity.promotion2}, #{entity.account1}, #{entity.account2}, #{entity.check1}, #{entity.check2}, #{entity.bill1}, #{entity.bill2}, #{entity.cash1}, #{entity.cash2}, #{entity.staffCount}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.evaluateAmount}, #{entity.keyWorkCSub}, #{entity.keyWorkDSub}, #{entity.evaluateDSub}, #{entity.totalAllD}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.createTime})
on duplicate key update period = values(period), branch_code = values(branch_code), branch_name = values(branch_name), promotion_1 = values(promotion_1), promotion_2 = values(promotion_2), account_1 = values(account_1), account_2 = values(account_2), check_1 = values(check_1), check_2 = values(check_2), bill_1 = values(bill_1), bill_2 = values(bill_2), cash_1 = values(cash_1), cash_2 = values(cash_2), staff_count = values(staff_count), score = values(score), evaluate_amount = values(evaluate_amount), key_work_c_sub = values(key_work_c_sub), key_work_d_sub = values(key_work_d_sub), evaluate_d_sub = values(evaluate_d_sub), total_all_d = values(total_all_d), update_time = values(update_time), create_time = values(create_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_branch_performance
period = #{period},
branch_code = #{branchCode},
branch_name = #{branchName},
promotion_1 = #{promotion1},
promotion_2 = #{promotion2},
account_1 = #{account1},
account_2 = #{account2},
check_1 = #{check1},
check_2 = #{check2},
bill_1 = #{bill1},
bill_2 = #{bill2},
cash_1 = #{cash1},
cash_2 = #{cash2},
staff_count = #{staffCount},
score = #{score},
evaluate_amount = #{evaluateAmount},
key_work_c_sub = #{keyWorkCSub},
key_work_d_sub = #{keyWorkDSub},
evaluate_d_sub = #{evaluateDSub},
total_all_d = #{totalAllD},
update_time = #{updateTime},
create_time = #{createTime},
where id = #{id}
